AI video is finally animatable inside After Effects

I’ve been quiet on here for a couple weeks because we’ve been deep in the cave building Tether.

The beta has quietly grown to nearly 2,000 animators / motion designers / AE experts, and watching people use it has been 🔥.

What Tether does:

It lets you generate AI video directly inside
Adobe
After Effects with proper timeline control - no round-tripping, no broken keyframes, no “export → prompt → pray → import.”

New features I’m excited about:

1) Scale control
You can push/pull scale over time inside AE and Tether respects it in the render. This means you can do real animation beats (not just static generations) and keep everything editable.

2) Rotation control
 Same idea — keyframe rotation, get coherent motion back. It sounds small until you’re trying to art-direct a shot and every workaround feels like duct tape.

3) Parented Null workflows
This one’s a game-changer. You can parent layers/nulls the way you normally would in AE and Tether builds the motion cleanly from that structure. So your rigs and your comps stay… sane.

The goal is simple: AI video that behaves like animation, not like a lottery ticket.

I’m aiming to open public beta soon.

If you want early access + founder pricing when it opens, drop “TETHER” in the comments or DM me and I’ll add you to the list.

And if you’re already in the beta let me know what you're using it for - I’d love to see what’s emerging.

Stay close.

Big thanks to
Karim Sayed
and
Simon Spencer-Harvey
for allowing use of their clips made with Tether in the video

If you want early access updates or to be considered for the final beta wave, please drop your details in this form:

My team and I are going through comments and messages as fast as we can and will be replying as we work through everything. 

Really appreciate your patience and your energy on this!

It's been a pleasure to be in beta test. beside that, the Tool is really efficient and help a lot or non-character animators, to get the moves done in a simple controllable way, where other ai can't do that. and it's not just words but there is not a single Ai tool in the market right now even the big names!, give you full control over your rig!. but Fossa give a full control, for each null to be rigged, and controlled after with directional prompt, which give a pretty decent results. and i believe Fossa will change the industry to be better and be the Main AE ai tool for rigging.
